title: juncus elliottii
intro: Juncus elliottii, also known as Elliott's rush or Elliott's jointed rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Juncus elliottii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
